notes: Tried disabling D3d11 and using Wine D3d11, neither worked, just came up with a failed to initialize graphics error asking if hardware acceleration was on and D3d11 was installed. Disable Esync just made steam refuse to launch the game, wouldn't even show the graphics error.
title: Clone Drone in the Danger Zone

notes: It worked after adding %command% to the end of the launch option (so it reads "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%")
